build.buildCommand: pnpm --filter @research/api build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d='apps/api/dist';const fix=f=>{let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const r=c.match(/(?:from|export)\s+[\"'](?:\.\.?\/[^\"']+)[\"'](?!\.js)/g)||[];r.forEach(m=>{const p=m.match(/(?:from|export)\s+[\"']([^\"']+)[\"']/)[1];c=c.replace(m,m.replace(p,p+'.js'))});if(c!==fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')){fs.writeFileSync(f,c);console.log('Fixed:',f)}};const walk=d=>{fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(n=>{const p=d+'/'+n;fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()?walk(p):n.endsWith('.js')&&fix(p)})};walk(d);"
